completed_tasks.name: Wi-Fi constraint for radio detection documented
Started discussion of friend-or-foe pattern
completed_tasks.progress: Initial framing only; no design decision approved yet.

remaining_tasks.name: Clarify what the friend-or-foe pattern classifies
Split the idea into minimal near-term scope and later large development
Write and commit a design/spec after discussion

blockers.description: Home machine has no Android development toolchain.
blockers.workaround: Do discussions, analysis, planning, and Obsidian documentation only until the user explicitly says the Android toolchain is installed.

blockers.description: BLE migration is not available now per customer discussion.
blockers.workaround: Treat Wi-Fi as the necessary current radio layer and defer BLE.

human_actions_pending.action: Send or provide details of the Wi-Fi chip/module used by the customer.
human_actions_pending.context: Needed before analyzing real radio behavior and tuning the Wi-Fi detection strategy.

human_actions_pending.action: Clarify intended meaning of friend-or-foe for the next discussion.
human_actions_pending.context: Need to know whether it classifies beacons/anomalies, players/devices, QR/actions, or a combination.

decisions.decision: Obsidian under stalker/ is the source of truth for human-readable project context.
decisions.rationale: Keeps code changes synchronized with design decisions, notes, checks, and discussion context.

decisions.decision: On the home machine, do not perform Android development or testing.
decisions.rationale: The Android toolchain is not installed there; the user explicitly limited home sessions to discussion until further notice.

decisions.decision: Wi-Fi remains the current radio layer and is considered a necessary evil.
decisions.rationale: Customer cannot move to BLE now and uses Wi-Fi hardware that will be analyzed later.

next_action: Resume the friend-or-foe discussion by asking what exactly should be classified: beacon/anomaly, player/device, QR/action, or a minimal subset.
context_notes: The next session should start fresh but read Obsidian first. The user expects a split between the minimum useful change that can be reasoned about now and a later larger development. Do not implement or test Android code while on the home machine.
